hero.title: ADAPT
hero.subtitle2: The platform that connects coaches and athletes. Personalized programs, 30-second check-ins, real-time tracking.

features.f1Desc: Every morning, you log your energy, sleep and motivation in 30 seconds. The algorithm computes your ADAPT score and adjusts your session accordingly.
features.f2Desc: Your coach builds tailored programs: exercise blocks, intensities, rest days. Each session is recalculated based on how you feel today.
features.f3Desc: Your coach sees your check-ins, performances and PRs as they come in. Automatic alerts, built-in messaging — distance no longer matters.

forWho.athletesDesc: No more generic programs. ADAPT adjusts every session based on how you feel today. High fatigue? Intensity adapts. You're firing on all cylinders? We push the loads.
forWho.coachesDesc: Centralize the management of all your athletes in a single dashboard. Build custom programs, receive check-ins, and get real-time alerts.

cta.subtitle: Athlete or coach, ADAPT adapts to you. Download the app or create your free coach account.

reset.title: RESET MY PASSWORD
reset.instructions: This link must be opened in the ADAPT app on your phone. If the app didn't open automatically, tap the button below.
reset.noApp: Don't have the ADAPT app installed yet? Ask your coach for it.
reset.invalidMessage: This link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one from the app.

legal.intro: In accordance with applicable Belgian law, you will find below the legal information regarding the publisher of the adapt-system.be website and the ADAPT mobile application.

sections.title: 1. Site publisher
sections.content:
Site published by ADAPT System.

Contact: hello@adapt-system.be

sections.title: 2. Hosting
sections.content:
This site is hosted on a secure cloud infrastructure.

For any technical question, please contact the site's contact email address.

sections.title: 3. Purpose of the site
sections.content: The adapt-system.be website presents the ADAPT platform, a smart sports coaching service connecting coaches and athletes through a mobile app and a web dashboard. Its purpose is to present the service, allow contact and provide the legal information relating to the use of the application.

sections.title: 4. Intellectual property
sections.content:
All elements of this site (structure, texts, logos, graphics, photographs, videos, illustrations, source code, trademarks, database) are protected by the laws in force relating to intellectual property.

Any reproduction, representation, modification, publication or adaptation, in whole or in part, by any means whatsoever, is prohibited without the prior written authorization of the publisher, except for uses permitted by law.

Content belonging to third parties (partner logos, photographs, etc.) remains the exclusive property of their respective holders.

sections.title: 5. Responsibility for user content
sections.content:
Users who transmit content via the application (photos, messages, training data) warrant that they have the necessary rights to such content and warrant that it does not infringe the rights of third parties.

The publisher disclaims any responsibility for content provided by users and reserves the right to remove any manifestly unlawful content.

sections.title: 6. Authorized use of the site
sections.content:
The user agrees not to use the site and the application:

— for illegal purposes or contrary to public decency
— to attempt intrusion, disruption or breach of security
— to send unsolicited messages (spam)
— to impersonate a third party
— to exploit content without authorization
— to introduce malicious elements (viruses, scripts)

sections.title: 7. Limitation of liability
sections.content:
The information provided on the site is given for guidance only. The publisher strives to ensure the accuracy and updating of the information, but cannot guarantee the absence of any error or service interruption.

The use of sports advice and training programs is at the user's own responsibility, who is invited to consult a healthcare professional in case of doubt. This limitation applies within the limits of applicable law.

sections.title: 8. External links
sections.content: The site may contain links to third-party services (App Store, social networks, etc.) over which the publisher has no control. The publisher disclaims all responsibility regarding their content, privacy policies or practices.

sections.title: 9. Personal data
sections.content: The processing of personal data is the subject of a dedicated privacy policy, accessible from the site's footer.

sections.title: 10. Applicable law
sections.content:
These legal notices are governed by Belgian law.

Any dispute relating to the use of the site or the application will be submitted to the competent courts of the publisher's registered office.

Last updated: May 3, 2026

cookies.intro: This page describes the use of cookies and similar technologies on the adapt-system.be website. The ADAPT mobile application does not use cookies.

sections.title: 1. What is a cookie?
sections.content: A cookie is a small text file placed on your device (computer, tablet, smartphone) when visiting a website. It allows the site to remember certain information related to your browsing, such as your language preference or your session.

sections.title: 2. Cookies used on this site
sections.content:
The adapt-system.be site uses only cookies strictly necessary for the operation of the site:

— Language preference (fr / en): stored locally in your browser to remember your display choice.

No audience measurement, advertising or third-party tracking cookies are placed.

sections.title: 3. Consent
sections.content: Cookies strictly necessary for the operation of the site do not require your prior consent, in accordance with applicable legislation. As no other cookies are used, no consent banner is displayed.

sections.title: 4. Manage cookies
sections.content:
You can delete the cookies placed on your device at any time via your browser settings:

— Chrome: Settings > Privacy and security > Cookies
— Firefox: Settings > Privacy & Security
— Safari: Preferences > Privacy
— Edge: Settings > Cookies and site permissions

Deleting the language preference will reset your choice on your next visit.

sections.title: 5. Third-party content
sections.content: The site loads fonts from Google Fonts (fonts.googleapis.com / fonts.gstatic.com) to display the site's typography. These resources may generate connection logs on Google's side. No cookies are placed via these resources.

sections.title: 6. Updates
sections.content:
This policy may be updated to reflect changes in the technologies used or in legislation. The date of the last update is indicated below.

Last updated: May 3, 2026

privacy.intro: This privacy policy describes how ADAPT System collects, uses and protects your personal data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and applicable Belgian legislation.

sections.title: 1. Data controller
sections.content:
ADAPT System is responsible for processing your personal data collected through the ADAPT mobile app and the adapt-system.be website.

Contact: hello@adapt-system.be

sections.title: 2. Data we collect
sections.content:
We collect the following data:

— Account information: last name, first name, email address, password (encrypted)
— Profile data: weight, height, goals, date of birth
— Training data: daily check-ins (energy, sleep, motivation), completed sessions, loads used, personal records
— Communication data: messages exchanged with your coach via the app
— Technical data: device identifier, IP address, connection logs

sections.title: 3. Purposes of processing
sections.content:
Your data is used to:

— Provide and personalize the sports coaching service
— Adapt training programs to your daily state
— Enable communication between coaches and athletes
— Send notifications related to your program
— Ensure the security and proper functioning of the app
— Comply with our legal obligations

sections.title: 4. Legal basis
sections.content:
Processing of your data is based on:

— Performance of the contract (delivery of the ADAPT service)
— Your explicit consent for sensitive data (health and performance data)
— Our legitimate interests in improving the service
— Compliance with our legal obligations

sections.title: 5. Data sharing
sections.content:
Your data is shared with:

— Your ADAPT coach: check-in data, performances, messages
— Our technical subcontractors (hosting, email sending) under confidentiality agreement
— Competent authorities in case of legal obligation

We never sell your data to third parties.

sections.title: 6. Data retention
sections.content:
Your data is kept:

— Account and profile data: for the duration of your registration + 2 years
— Training data: for the duration of your registration
— Messaging data: for the duration of your registration
— Technical logs: 12 months maximum

In case of account deletion, your data is erased within 30 days, unless legally required to be retained.

sections.title: 7. Your rights
sections.content:
In accordance with GDPR, you have the following rights:

— Right of access: obtain a copy of your data
— Right to rectification: correct inaccurate data
— Right to erasure: request deletion of your data
— Right to portability: receive your data in a structured format
— Right to object: object to certain processing
— Right to restriction: restrict the use of your data

To exercise these rights, contact us at: hello@adapt-system.be

You can also lodge a complaint with the Data Protection Authority (DPA): www.autoriteprotectiondonnees.be

sections.title: 8. Security
sections.content:
We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data:

— Password encryption (bcrypt)
— Encrypted communications (HTTPS/TLS)
— Data access restricted to authorized personnel
— Regular backups

sections.title: 9. Cookies
sections.content: The ADAPT mobile app does not use cookies. The adapt-system.be website may use technical cookies necessary for the proper functioning of the site. No advertising or tracking cookies are used.

sections.title: 10. Changes
sections.content:
This privacy policy may be updated. In case of substantial changes, you will be notified by email or via the app. The date of the last update is indicated below.

Last updated: April 30, 2026
